accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Two-column layout (content left, skill opportunities right) was not visually verified; some skill references may have merged with content.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.

findings.issue: Assessable content (left column) and Key opportunities for skills development (right column) were separated based on layout inference from pdftotext output, not visual review.
findings.required_fix: Independent reviewer to sample 2-3 two-column pages to confirm left/right separation before builder finalises topics.json.

findings.issue: Only required practicals 1-4 were sampled; full list of 10 practicals and their AT/WS/MS links not fully audited.
findings.required_fix: Builder to verify full required practical list if used as assessment constraints.
